entries.name: Thankful Tip (Newbie Package)
entries.tooltipMarkup: A thankful tip. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: 感谢您一直以来对生肖传说的关爱，由衷地希望您能继续支持国产、支持金酷、支持生肖传说，下面就您自己的世界了，还是开篇那句话：成神成魔全在一念之间。如果您对生肖传说有任何的意见和建议，可以通过任何渠道告诉我们，我们也会虚心接受并加以改进。祝您一帆风顺，也祝生肖传说荣膺2008最有创意国产回合制网络游戏。

entries.name: Thankful Tip (Reunion Package)
entries.tooltipMarkup: A thank-you letter. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: 感谢您再次回到生肖传说，在您不在的这段时间，生肖一直都在改变着，不仅增加了新的系统，新的玩法，并且还听取了很多玩家的意见，对游戏的一些设置做了合理的改变，希望您这次回来后不仅能感受到生肖传说做出的改变，更希望您能越来越喜欢生肖传说，金酷一直都是把玩家放在第一位的，玩家的意见更是生肖传说发展的重要法宝，如果您有新的想法，新的意见，欢迎你随时提供给我们；生肖传说曾经是你们的家，希望以后也会是。

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.1- Lvl.5) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Welcome to World of Zodiac! This is a world of Gods and Evils. You have a long way to go before becoming the chosen Zodiac. Wear the hap in your bag, please. It is a feature of this world. You can also select other haps in VIP Mall.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.6- Lvl.10) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: You mission is to perish 12 Doomsday Monsters. You will began to meet them at your 50 Level. For Justice and Peace, come on! And you may already have found that clothes not only for wear but also enjoys hidden status. Gather a suit to active hidden status, please.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.11- Lvl.15) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Same clothes can be compounded. There is a chance to get better status. You can capture monsters by mob flask. When Zodiac Pet reaches 30 level, it can evolve by composing with wild pet. Pet’s shape and power will be largely enhanced after evolution. Other secrets of Zodiac Online: You can get various titles by killing different monsters. Map will be open by clicking TAB. You can locate exact coordinates on map which is very useful for treasure digger. At last, skill enjoys proficiency. Higher proficiency will leads to higher power. Pay attention to skill proficiency, please.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.16- Lvl.20) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: It is a fantasy world. You can transform yourself into any things you like. Try the Morph in your bag. If you want to level up quickly, go to kill mobs in Devil Dock and Golden Path. Or accept recycle quests from Commander in Cloud City.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.21- Lvl.25) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Renown Points plays an important role in Zodiac Online. It can exchange to Skill Proficiency, life skill or money. Locate Thad in Cloud City for Renown Point Quest. You can accept 90 times RP quest. Renown Points will grow from the 21st time. Do not give up. With treasure map, you can locate the exact coordinates to dig for rare items. And you are in age of marriage. Have found your lover? Go to find Match-maker and Red Lady in Cloud City, please.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.26- Lvl.30) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: You can PK with other players to check your item quality. Then go to locate Blacksmith to upgrade item status. And it play video games with your lover. It is very funny.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.31- Lvl.35) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Two heads are better than one. Many hands make light work…….There is a Guild Manager in Cloud City. You can join or create a guild from Guild Manager. Select a beachhead place carefully. Every guild enjoys an independent map. You can decide how to build it…… Guild expansion and guild war is also very funny. Have a try, please.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.35- Lvl.40) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Add Spirit Stone, Curse Spinel and Devine Spinel to your weapon to educe weapon soul. Do not envy others who have sparking weapons. You can also get one!

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.41- Lvl.50) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Open slot on your weapon and embed status diamond on it. You can open slot on it. At this level, we strongly suggest you to do the above operation. You can take a pet cage and find pet curer to store your pet.

entries.name: Newbie Package (Lvl.50) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Item status can be increased through item refining. Add special status stones onto it to make your weapon more powerful. When you have a powerful weapon, excellent skill ability and high level, go to full fill your destiny. A doomsday monster is ahead waiting for you.

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.1- Lvl.5) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Weclome back to Zodiac Online. 欢迎您再次来到生肖传说的神仙世界，在您不在的这段时间，生肖传说有着很大的改变，这些改变不仅包括增加了很多的新系统，新玩法，并且还听取了很多玩家的意见对游戏的一些设置进行了合理的修改，希望您这次回来后能感觉到生肖传说正在做出的一步步改变。

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.6- Lvl.10) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: You shall be familiar with it, don’t you? Mission for Zodiac Envoys are to kill 12 Doomsday Monsters. The first Doomsday Monster will appear at your 50 level. Fight for Justice and Peace!

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.11- Lvl.15) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: At your 10 level, you can buy fashion show clothes at MALL. 7 different parts clothes can be changed as you wish. Same-part clothes can be compound at NPC. After compounding, clothes status will greatly increase. Locate Thad in Cloud City for Renown Point Quest. You can accept 90 times RP quests. Renown Points will grow from the 21st time. You can exchange RP points to life skills, skill proficiency and treasure map.

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.16- Lvl.20) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Your experience will increase largely while mobbing in wild during these days. Before killing monsters, go to accept double-experience at Double-Ex. Man. Everyone can accept 7 hours per week. At weekends, you can get 2 hour double-experience time.  If you still need more experience, go to Mall to buy VIP items!

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.21- Lvl.25) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: When a male and a female player reach 20 level, they can accept marriage quest at Match-maker in Cloud City to get married. A romantic wedding party will be hold for the new couple.

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.26- Lvl.30) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: After 20 level, you can start to refine your own elite weapon. There are lots of items and material in Zodiac Online which can be used to upgrade your weapon. Want a sparking weapon? Use weapon soul and spirit stone! Want an item of higher status points? Use Pink Stone and Skyblue stone!

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.31- Lvl.35) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: Congratulations! You are 30 level now. Have you found that some monsters did not provide experience anymore? There are various hidden map in Zodiac Online. Kill a gate monster to get access the hidden map. A higher monster is waiting for you! Lion Caption is a unlucky dog. Everyday he will be beaten and his underwear will be robbed. It is said when you collect enough Lion Caption Underwears, you can get special title. You can also establish a guild at Guild Manager in Cloud City. It will cost you lots of money.

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.35- Lvl.40) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: After create a guild, you can not only enroll new members but also build various constructions. All constructions has its role. Guild war is favored by all players. To win the guild war, you need to cooperate with your guild mates.

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.41- Lvl.50) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: At your 40 level, you can become a mentor. You can enroll apprentice. M/A system is a feature of Zodiac Online! You can also buy 40 level fashion show clothes. As same as at 10 level, you can compose it at NPC. Clothes is of importance in PK. Its status will greatly enhance your power…

entries.name: Reunion Package (Lvl.50) Tip
entries.tooltipMarkup: A guiding note with plenty information. Right-Click for more information.
entries.description: You are a Master when you reach your 50 level. Lots of BOSS are waiting for you. The most challenging one is Doomsday Monster! This is also Zodiac’s mission. To kill Doomsday Monster, Zodiacs need to coordinate with each other and kill him by teamwork. You will be rewarded with VIP item and large amount of experience.
